nodes.name: hpdb_traversal
nodes.description: Recursive traversal over hPDB-style atom, residue, chain, model, and structure records.
nodes.conceptual_summary: Walks nested protein-structure records and returns selected lower-level records.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: The upstream hPDB ingest source exposes separate recursive atom and residue traversal methods, so the public atoms keep the same split.

nodes.name: iterate_pdb_atoms
nodes.description: Return atom records found by recursively walking an hPDB-style hierarchy, optionally filtered by chemical element.

inputs.name: chemical_element
inputs.constraints: Optional case-insensitive atom element symbol filter.

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: Atom records reached from the root and matching the optional element filter.

nodes.type_signature: (pdb_element: PDBElement, chemical_element: str | None = None) -> tuple[Atom, ...]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Recursive atom traversal with an optional element filter.

nodes.name: iterate_pdb_residues
nodes.description: Return residue records found by recursively walking an hPDB-style hierarchy, optionally filtered by contained atom element.

inputs.name: pdb_element
inputs.constraints: Root object for recursive residue traversal.

inputs.name: chemical_element
inputs.constraints: Optional case-insensitive contained-atom element symbol filter.

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: Residue records reached from the root and matching the optional element filter.

nodes.type_signature: (pdb_element: Residue | Chain | Model | Structure, chemical_element: str | None = None) -> tuple[Residue, ...]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Recursive residue traversal with an optional contained-atom element filter.
